## Research Proposal

### Affiliation

- **Institution**: [Your university/research lab]
- **Department**: [e.g., Computer Science, Database Systems]
- **Position**: [e.g., PhD Student, Postdoc, Professor]

### Research Interests

Describe your research area and how it relates to this project.

### Proposed Extension

What aspect of this work do you want to extend?

- [ ] Core PBT algorithm enhancements
- [ ] New workload types or benchmarks
- [ ] Multi-objective optimization
- [ ] Transfer learning / warm-start
- [ ] Alternative database systems (MySQL, MongoDB, etc.)
- [ ] Cloud deployment / distributed PBT
- [ ] Other: ___________

### Research Questions

What specific research questions will you investigate?

1. **RQ1**: ...
2. **RQ2**: ...
3. **RQ3**: ...

### Methodology

Briefly describe your proposed approach:

- **Experimental setup**: ...
- **Baselines**: ...
- **Evaluation metrics**: ...
- **Expected contributions**: ...

### Timeline

- **Start date**: [Month, Year]
- **Expected completion**: [Month, Year]
- **Publication target**: [Conference/Journal name]

### Resources Available

- [ ] Compute resources (GPUs, cloud credits, etc.)
- [ ] Database systems access
- [ ] Benchmark datasets
- [ ] Domain expertise in: ___________

### Collaboration Model

How do you envision collaborating?

- [ ] Joint research paper (co-authorship)
- [ ] Separate paper with citation
- [ ] Fork with independent development
- [ ] Contribution to this repository

### Related Work

Cite relevant papers that inform your proposed work:

- [Author et al., Year] Paper title. Conference/Journal.
- [Author et al., Year] Paper title. Conference/Journal.

### Intellectual Property

- [ ] I understand this project is under Academic Research License
- [ ] My institution allows academic collaboration on this topic
- [ ] I agree to properly cite this work in any resulting publications

### Contact Information

- **Email**: [your.email@institution.edu]

- **Google Scholar**: [optional]
